6 New Google Gemini Updates: Maps, Docs, & Chrome Just Got Insane

Google just dropped six massive AI updates that integrate Gemini directly into the tools you use every day, including Maps, Docs, and Chrome. Learn how these new features, from immersive 3D navigation to AI-powered document drafting, will transform your productivity and business workflow.

00:00 - Intro: 6 Massive Gemini Updates
00:25 - Ask Maps: Conversational Navigation
01:30 - Immersive 3D View in Google Maps
02:26 - What is Google Gemini AI?
03:43 - Gemini in Docs, Sheets, & Drive
05:25 - Gemini Embedding 2: Multimodal AI
07:18 - Gemini Integration in Google Chrome
09:07 - Final Recap & Implementation
